info.title: Vedika Intelligence API
info.description:
**Vedika Intelligence** is a B2B astrology API platform delivering Vedic, Western, and KP astrology
computations with AI-powered interpretations. 140+ endpoints covering Vedic, Western, KP, and Numerology. Swiss Ephemeris precision.

## Key Capabilities

- **AI Astrology Chat** -- Natural language astrology Q&A with chart-grounded responses
- **Vedic Astrology (V2)** -- Kundli, Dasha, Doshas, Panchang, Muhurta, Guna Milan, Predictions, Divisional Charts
- **Western Astrology (V2)** -- Transits, Progressions, Solar Returns, Synastry, Composite Charts, Horoscopes
- **Numerology** -- Pythagorean and Chaldean calculations (Life Path, Destiny, Personality, Soul Urge)
- **Swiss Ephemeris** -- Sub-arc-second planetary precision, sidereal (Lahiri) and tropical zodiacs

## Authentication

All paid endpoints require an API key in the `x-api-key` header:

```
x-api-key: vk_live_your_api_key_here
```

API keys are issued upon subscription. Format: `vk_live_*` (production), `vk_ent_*` (enterprise).

## Subscription Plans

| Plan | Price | Wallet Credits (USD) |
|------|-------|---------------------|
| Starter | $12/month | $12.00 |
| Pro | $60/month | $60.00 |
| Business | $120/month | $120.00 |
| Enterprise | $240/month | $240.00 |

There is no free tier. Each API call deducts from your wallet balance. The **Sandbox** environment
is free and requires no authentication -- use it for development and testing.

## Sandbox (Free)

The sandbox provides mock responses matching production response shapes. No API key needed.
Base URL: `https://api.vedika.io/sandbox`

Rate limit: 30 requests/minute per IP.

## Rate Limits

- **Starter:** 50 requests/minute
- **Pro:** 200 requests/minute
- **Business:** 500 requests/minute
- **Enterprise:** 1000 requests/minute

## Support

- **Documentation:** https://vedika.io/docs
- **Email:** support@vedika.io
- **Postman:** https://www.postman.com/vedikaai/workspace/intelligence-platform

tags.name: AI Chat
tags.description:
Natural language astrology queries powered by Vedika Intelligence. Ask questions about
career, marriage, health, finances, and more. Responses are grounded in Swiss Ephemeris
computed chart data with precision-verified accuracy.

tags.name: V2 Vedic Charts
tags.description:
Birth chart (Kundli), planetary positions, divisional charts (D9 Navamsa, D10 Dasamsa),
and related Vedic astrology computations. All calculations use the sidereal zodiac (Lahiri ayanamsa).

tags.name: V2 Vedic Dasha
tags.description: Vimshottari Dasha (120-year planetary period) calculations including Mahadasha and Antardasha periods.

tags.name: V2 Vedic Doshas
tags.description: Dosha (inauspicious combination) detection -- Mangal Dosha, Kaal Sarp Dosha, Pitru Dosha, Nadi Dosha.

tags.name: V2 Vedic Matching
tags.description:
Kundli matching and compatibility. Guna Milan (Ashtakoot, 36-point system), Nakshatra Porutham
(South Indian 10-factor matching), and Thirumana Porutham (Tamil marriage matching).

tags.name: V2 Vedic Transits
tags.description: Saturn and Moon transit calculations -- Sade Sati (7.5-year Saturn transit) and Chandrashtama periods.

tags.name: V2 Panchang
tags.description: Hindu calendar (Panchang) elements -- Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana for any date and location.

tags.name: V2 Muhurta
tags.description:
Auspicious and inauspicious time period calculations -- Choghadiya, Hora, Rahu Kaal,
Gulika Kaal, Yamaghanta, Abhijit Muhurta, Brahma Muhurta, Durmuhurta.

tags.name: V2 Predictions
tags.description:
Horoscope predictions by rashi (Moon sign) or birth details. Daily, weekly, monthly,
quarterly, and yearly periods available.

tags.name: V2 Numerology
tags.description:
Pythagorean and Chaldean numerology. Life Path, Destiny, Personality, Soul Urge,
Personal Year, Complete analysis, and Compatibility.

tags.name: V2 Western
tags.description:
Western (tropical zodiac) astrology -- transit charts, secondary progressions, solar returns,
synastry, composite charts, and daily horoscopes by zodiac sign.

tags.name: Conversations
tags.description:
Manage AI chat conversation sessions. List, retrieve, delete, and extend conversations
for multi-turn dialogue.

tags.name: Usage
tags.description: Wallet balance, usage history, and analytics for your API account.

tags.name: Pricing
tags.description: Public pricing information for all V2 endpoints. No authentication required.

tags.name: Sandbox
tags.description:
Free testing environment with mock data matching production response shapes.
No API key required. Rate limited to 30 requests/minute per IP.

post.description:
Send a natural language astrology question with birth details. Returns an AI-generated
astrological analysis grounded in Swiss Ephemeris computed chart data.

Supports Vedic, Western, and KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) astrological systems.
Specify the system via the `system` field (default: vedic).

Responses include follow-up suggestions for multi-turn conversations.
Pass `conversationId` from a previous response to continue the conversation.

value.question: What does my chart say about my career prospects in 2026?
When is the best time for marriage?
What are my current transits indicating?
Tell me more about the Mahadasha you mentioned

400.description: Invalid request (missing question or birth details)

post.description:
Same as `/api/v1/astrology/query` but returns a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream.
Tokens are streamed as they are generated, providing real-time output.

**Event types:**
- `token` -- Individual text tokens
- `metadata` -- Processing metadata (model, timing)
- `birthChart` -- Computed birth chart data
- `done` -- Stream complete signal
- `error` -- Error event

Connect with `EventSource` or any SSE client library.

Generate a complete Kundli (birth chart) with all 12 houses, planetary positions,
nakshatras, dignities, aspects, and house lordships. Sidereal zodiac (Lahiri ayanamsa).

Price: $0.028 per call.

Generate a basic birth chart with planetary positions, signs, houses, and degrees.
Lighter than full Kundli.

Price: $0.016 per call.

Get precise planetary positions at birth time. Includes longitude, sign, house,
nakshatra, pada, dignity (exalted/debilitated/own/moolatrikona), and retrograde status.

Price: $0.016 per call.

Generate the Navamsa (D-9) divisional chart. Used for marriage analysis, dharma,
and assessing true planetary strength. Includes Vargottama flags.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Calculate the complete Vimshottari Dasha (120-year planetary period cycle).
Returns Mahadasha, Antardasha, and Pratyantardasha periods with start/end dates.

Aliases: `/v2/astrology/dasha-periods`

Price: $0.016 per call.

Get Mahadasha (main planetary periods) with dates and ruling planet for each period.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Get Antardasha (sub-periods) within each Mahadasha. Returns nested period structure.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Check for Mangal (Mars) Dosha -- also known as Manglik Dosha or Kuja Dosha.
Checks Mars placement in houses 1, 2, 4, 7, 8, 12 from Lagna, Moon, and Venus.
Includes cancellation conditions per BPHS.

Price: $0.016 per call.

Detect Kaal Sarp Dosha -- formed when all planets are hemmed between Rahu and Ketu.
Returns dosha type (Anant, Kulik, Vasuki, etc.) and severity.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Check for Pitru (ancestral) Dosha. Analyzes Sun, Saturn, Rahu placements
and 9th house affliction.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Check for Nadi Dosha -- Nadi incompatibility based on nakshatra classification
(Vata, Pitta, Kapha). Important for marriage compatibility.

Price: $0.028 per call.

36-point Guna (Ashtakoot) matching for marriage compatibility. Evaluates 8 factors:
Varna, Vashya, Tara, Yoni, Graha Maitri, Gana, Bhakoot, Nadi.

Returns total score out of 36 with per-factor breakdown.

Aliases: `/v2/astrology/kundali-matching`, `/v2/astrology/kundli-matching`, `/v2/astrology/kundli-match`, `/v2/astrology/ashtakoot-match`

Price: $0.048 per call.

400.description: Invalid request (missing male or female birth details)

post.description:
10-factor South Indian marriage compatibility matching based on nakshatra.
Evaluates: Dinam, Ganam, Yoni, Rasi, Rasiyathipathi, Rajju, Vedha, Vasya, Mahendram, Stree Deergham.

Alias: `/v2/astrology/porutham`

Price: $0.048 per call.

Calculate Saturn's 7.5-year transit (Sade Sati) relative to natal Moon sign.
Returns current phase (Rising, Peak, Setting), start/end dates, and intensity.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Advanced Sade Sati analysis with detailed phase breakdown, transit effects,
and BPHS-based remedies.

Price: $0.040 per call.

200.description: Advanced Sade Sati analysis with remedies

get.description:
Get today's full Panchang (Hindu calendar) -- Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana,
Sunrise, Sunset, Moonrise, and Rahu Kaal.

Defaults to New Delhi (28.6139, 77.2090) if no location provided.

Price: $0.012 per call.

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: UTC offset timezone (e.g., "+05:30", "-04:00"). IANA names like "Asia/Kolkata" also accepted. Default: +05:30

get.description:
Get Panchang for a specific date. Same data as today's Panchang but for any historical
or future date.

Price: $0.012 per call.

200.description: Panchang data for the specified date

get.description:
Get today's Choghadiya (auspicious/inauspicious time slots). Each slot is ~1.5 hours
with quality classification: Amrit, Shubh, Labh, Char, Rog, Kaal, Udveg.

Price: $0.012 per call.

Get today's Rahu Kaal (inauspicious period ruled by Rahu). Avoid starting
new ventures during this period.

Price: $0.012 per call.

Get today's Abhijit Muhurta -- the most auspicious 48-minute window around solar noon.
Considered universally auspicious for all activities.

Price: $0.012 per call.

post.description:
Get daily horoscope prediction. Can be requested by rashi (Moon sign name)
or by birth details (Moon sign is auto-calculated).

Price: $0.020 per call.

Get weekly horoscope prediction by rashi or birth details.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Get monthly horoscope prediction by rashi or birth details.

Price: $0.040 per call.

Get yearly horoscope prediction by rashi or birth details.

Price: $0.088 per call.

Get all core numerology numbers in one call: Life Path, Destiny (Expression),
Personality, Soul Urge (Heart's Desire), with interpretations, strengths, challenges,
career suggestions, and lucky colors/numbers.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Calculate Life Path Number from birth date. The most important number in numerology,
representing your life's purpose and the path you walk.

Price: $0.012 per call.

Calculate Destiny (Expression) Number from full name. Reveals your natural talents
and the abilities you are meant to develop.

Price: $0.012 per call.

Compare numerology profiles of two people for compatibility. Analyzes
Life Path, Destiny, and Soul Urge number compatibility.

Price: $0.020 per call.

Get current planetary transits compared to the natal chart (tropical zodiac).
Shows transit planets, their natal aspects, and transit-to-natal house positions.

Price: $0.020 per call.

Generate a synastry chart comparing two people's natal charts for relationship
compatibility (tropical zodiac). Returns inter-aspects and house overlays.

Price: $0.048 per call.

400.description: Missing person1 or person2 birth details

post.description:
Generate a composite chart (midpoint method) for two people. The composite chart
represents the relationship itself as an entity.

Price: $0.048 per call.

Calculate secondary progressions (1 day = 1 year symbolic movement). Shows progressed
planetary positions relative to natal chart for long-term life themes.

Price: $0.028 per call.

Generate a solar return chart for a specific year. The solar return occurs when
the Sun returns to its exact natal position -- a birthday chart for the year ahead.

Pass `year` in the request body (defaults to current year).

Price: $0.028 per call.

year.description: Year for the solar return (defaults to current year)

get.description:
Get today's Western horoscope for a zodiac sign. Uses tropical zodiac.

Valid signs: aries, taurus, gemini, cancer, leo, virgo, libra, scorpio,
sagittarius, capricorn, aquarius, pisces.

Price: $0.048 per call.

example.error: Invalid sign. Valid options: aries, taurus, gemini, cancer, leo, virgo, libra, scorpio, sagittarius, capricorn, aquarius, pisces

get.description:
Returns pricing for all V2 Vedic astrology endpoints. No authentication required.
Includes price per call, category, and description for each endpoint.
Returns pricing for all V2 Western astrology endpoints. No authentication required.
Get current wallet balance and subscription status.

walletBalance.description: Balance in USD (converted from cents stored in Firestore)

get.description: Get paginated usage transaction history. Filter by date range or transaction type.

Get aggregated usage statistics for a date range. Returns total calls,
total cost, average cost per call, and breakdown by endpoint.

List all AI chat conversations for the authenticated user. Returns conversation
metadata (ID, creation date, last message timestamp, message count).
Retrieve a specific conversation with full message history.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Conversation ID returned from a previous AI query

delete.description: Delete a conversation and all its messages.

post.description:
Free sandbox version of the AI astrology chat. Returns mock responses matching
the production V1 response shape. No API key required.

**Note:** Use the sandbox server URL (`https://api.vedika.io/sandbox`).

question.example: What does my chart say about career?

post.description:
Free sandbox version of the birth chart endpoint. Returns mock Kundli data matching
the production V2 response shape. No API key required.

**Note:** Use the sandbox server URL (`https://api.vedika.io/sandbox`).

Accepts both V2 flat format (`datetime`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `timezone`)
and nested format (`birthDetails: { ... }`).

get.description:
Free sandbox version of today's Panchang. Returns mock data. No API key required.

**Note:** Use the sandbox server URL (`https://api.vedika.io/sandbox`).
API health status. No authentication required.
Ultra-fast health check. Returns "pong". No authentication required.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description:
API key for authentication. Format: `vk_live_*` (production) or `vk_ent_*` (enterprise).
Obtained upon subscription at https://vedika.io/pricing.

datetime.description: Birth date and time in ISO 8601 format (without timezone suffix -- timezone is a separate field)

timezone.description: UTC offset in +HH:MM or -HH:MM format (NOT IANA timezone names)

MatchingRequest.description: Birth details for both partners in matching/compatibility calculations

NumerologyRequest.description: Name and birth date for numerology calculations

PredictionByRashi.description: Request prediction by rashi (Moon sign) name

AIQueryRequest.description: AI astrology chat request. birthDetails is required for personal readings (e.g., 'my career'). Educational questions (e.g., 'what is Rahu?') work without it. You can also send flat fields (date, time, latitude, longitude, timezone) at the top level instead of nested birthDetails.

question.example: What does my chart say about my career prospects?

language.description: Response language (ISO 639-1 code). Supports 30+ languages including hi, ta, te, kn, ml, bn, mr, gu, pa, ur, etc.

conversationId.description: Pass a conversation ID from a previous response to continue a multi-turn conversation

response.description: AI-generated astrological analysis text (400-800 words for follow-ups, 800-1500 for initial queries)
response.example: Based on your birth chart, your Ascendant is in Libra at 15.42 degrees...

followUpSuggestions.description: Suggested follow-up questions for multi-turn conversation
example: Tell me more about my current Mahadasha
What career fields suit my chart?
When is a good period for financial investments?

error.example: Invalid birth details: datetime is required

example.error: Invalid or missing API key. Include x-api-key header with a valid vk_live_* key.
Insufficient wallet balance. Current balance: $0.00. This call costs $0.028. Please top up at https://vedika.io/pricing
Invalid birth details: datetime, latitude, longitude, and timezone are required
